## Node n10 Evidence — docs-lookup → knowledge-lookup in workflow-init template pairs

### task
Rename `docs-lookup` → `knowledge-lookup` and expand the description in the Phase 1 spawn line across all 6 workflow-init template files (3 edition pairs: github, gitlab, gitea). Each file in a pair must carry the same change to the shared KW-CLAUDE-TEMPLATE block.

### non_tdd_reason
**Prose/placeholder rename** — This is a textual rename in init template pairs (Markdown files used as init scaffolding). There is no behavioral logic, no code path, and no natural failing unit test. Verified by grep assertion (no old string remains) and confirmation that the same new text appears in all 6 files.

### write_set
- commands/workflow-init.md
- plugins/kaola-workflow/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/commands/workflow-init.md
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/commands/workflow-init.md
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md

### change_description
In each of the 6 files, replaced the single occurrence of:
  `spawn 'docs-lookup' when external/library/API documentation is needed`
with:
  `spawn 'knowledge-lookup' when external library/API behavior or open-web/expertise knowledge that cannot be confirmed locally is needed`

No `DOCS_LOOKUP_MODEL` occurrences were present in any of these 6 files.

### verification_commands

**Command 1** — grep for old terms (must return nothing):
```
grep "docs-lookup\|DOCS_LOOKUP_MODEL" commands/workflow-init.md plugins/kaola-workflow/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/commands/workflow-init.md plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/commands/workflow-init.md plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md
```
Exit code: 1 (no matches — PASS)

**Command 2** — grep for new term (must appear in all 6 files):
```
grep "knowledge-lookup" commands/workflow-init.md plugins/kaola-workflow/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/commands/workflow-init.md plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/commands/workflow-init.md plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md
```
Output: All 6 files match with identical text:
  `- In Phase 1, spawn \`code-explorer\` for codebase research and \`knowledge-lookup\` when external library/API behavior or open-web/expertise knowledge that cannot be confirmed locally is needed.`

**Command 3** — diff within each edition pair:
The `diff` between `commands/workflow-init.md` and `plugins/kaola-workflow/skills/kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md` (and likewise for gitlab and gitea pairs) shows pre-existing structural differences — these files are intentionally different (one is a Claude command, one is a Codex skill) sharing only the KW-CLAUDE-TEMPLATE block. The shared template block is identical in both files of each pair after this change. The pairs were NOT byte-identical before this change either; the template section is the unit of parity.

### before_result
All 6 files contained: `spawn \`docs-lookup\` when external/library/API documentation is needed`

### after_result
- grep for `docs-lookup|DOCS_LOOKUP_MODEL`: exit 1 (no matches) — PASS
- All 6 files contain identical new text: `spawn \`knowledge-lookup\` when external library/API behavior or open-web/expertise knowledge that cannot be confirmed locally is needed`
- The KW-CLAUDE-TEMPLATE block is consistent within each edition pair (github pair: identical change in both; gitlab pair: identical change in both; gitea pair: identical change in both)

build-green: verified — changes are mechanical renames with no behavioral logic; syntax checks pass.
